item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, we often prioritize community needs over individual choices, especially in matters affecting public order and social stability.

notes: Agent A opens by disagreeing with society-over-individual priority, citing oppression and loss of freedom, but then shifts toward community needs, social cohesion, collective responsibility, and limits on freedoms during crises. Agent B remains more consistently individual-rights-first, while acknowledging common-good laws only under constitutional and democratic safeguards. The agents diverge rather than converge.
